props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display. When set, the card shows an error state with a cancel button.

props.name: filename
props.description: The name of the uploaded file to display.

props.name: progress
props.description: Upload progress percentage from 0-100. Use -1 to indicate upload is complete.

props.name: size
props.description: The file size in bytes. Displayed in a human-readable format (KB, MB).

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: The MIME type of the file. Used to determine the file type icon.

events.name: onCancel
events.description: Callback fired when the user clicks the cancel button during file upload.

events.name: onDelete
events.description: Callback fired when the user clicks the remove button on an uploaded file.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display. When set, the card shows an error state with a cancel button.

props.name: filename
props.description: The name of the uploaded file to display.

props.name: progress
props.description: Upload progress percentage from 0-100. Use -1 to indicate upload is complete.

props.name: size
props.description: The file size in bytes. Displayed in a human-readable format (KB, MB).

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: The MIME type of the file. Used to determine the file type icon.

events.name: onCancel
events.description: Emits when the user cancels a file upload. Emits a GoabFileUploadOnCancelDetail object with the filename.

events.name: onDelete
events.description: Emits when the user removes an uploaded file. Emits a GoabFileUploadOnDeleteDetail object with the filename.
